title: Glacier Sensor Net: budgeted Pareto hypervolume on a DTLZ2 surrogate
strategies: trivial: a single centre sensor x=[0.5,...] (one on-front point) -> ~0.1
greedy: a coarse 3x3 grid of position variables with distance variables pinned to 0.5
strong: a floor(sqrt(budget))^2 grid over the two position variables (endpoints included so axis extremes are hit) with distance variables pinned to 0.5 -> dense, well-spread on-front batch
invalid: decision coordinates outside [0,1] -> rejected, scores 0
